mapper.select: SELECT ca.*, s.name as studentName FROM credit_application ca LEFT JOIN student s ON ca.student_id = s.student_id WHERE ca.status = '未审核'
SELECT * FROM credit_application WHERE status IN ('已通过', '已拒绝')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_application ( application_id, student_id, category_id, application_reason, apply_date, status, credit_value ) VALUES ( #{applicationId}, #{studentId}, #{categoryId}, #{applicationReason}, #{applyDate}, #{status}, #{creditValue} )
mapper.update: UPDATE credit_application SET student_id = #{studentId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, application_reason = #{applicationReason}, status = #{status}, credit_value = #{creditValue} WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM credit_application WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = '已通过'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_application WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = '未审核'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_application WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
